heading: New spending authority
label: 543h New spending authority
text: Any new spending authority described in subsection (c)(2)(A) or (B) of section 651 of title 2 which is provided under sections 543 to 543h of this title shall be effective for any fiscal year only to such extent or in such amounts as are provided in appropriation Acts.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was amended by , (5), , , by striking out subsec. (c) and redesignating former subsec. (d) as (c).Section 651 of title 2Pub. L. 105–33, title X, § 10116(a)(3)111 Stat. 691Aug. 5, 1997
